title: Los Cinco Sentidos
subtitle: Descubre cómo exploramos el mundo
learning_objectives: Identificar los cinco sentidos: vista, oído, olfato, gusto, tacto
Comprender cómo usamos cada sentido en la vida diaria
Asociar órganos sensoriales con sus funciones (ojos-ver, oídos-escuchar, etc.)
Explorar el vocabulario sensorial (suave, áspero, dulce, salado, etc.)
Desarrollar conciencia del cuerpo y sus capacidades

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in bright educational style: A diverse group of happy preschool children exploring the world with wonder, each child using different senses - one looking at a rainbow, one listening to music, one smelling flowers, one tasting food, one touching soft textures. Colorful, joyful, engaging. Cartoon style, vibrant colors, preschool appropriate.
image_prompts.description: Niños descubriendo el mundo con sus sentidos

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in colorful style: Close-up of a child's smiling face with big bright eyes wide open, looking at a beautiful rainbow in the sky. Sparkling eyes full of wonder, rainbow with vivid colors, butterflies and birds flying. Cartoon style, emphasis on expressive eyes, magical discovery moment, preschool appropriate.
image_prompts.description: Una niña viendo un arcoíris con sus ojos

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in musical theme: A child with hands cupped behind ears, listening with delight to birds singing in trees, musical notes floating in the air. Other children playing instruments in the background - drums, tambourines, bells. Happy expressions. Cartoon style, soft musical colors, joyful sounds visualization, preschool appropriate.
image_prompts.description: Niños escuchando música y sonidos de la naturaleza

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in aromatic garden style: A child leaning down to smell colorful flowers in a garden - roses, sunflowers, daisies. Visible aroma lines wafting from flowers. Another child smelling freshly baked bread from a bakery window with visible steam swirls. Happy smiling faces. Cartoon style, warm inviting colors, preschool appropriate.
image_prompts.description: Niños oliendo flores y pan fresco

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in tasty food style: Children sitting at a colorful table tasting different fruits and foods - strawberries, lemons, watermelon, apples. Facial expressions showing different tastes: sweet smiles, sour pucker faces. Variety of colorful healthy foods on plates. Cartoon style, bright appetizing colors, expressive faces, preschool appropriate.
image_prompts.description: Niños probando diferentes sabores de frutas

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in texture exploration style: Close-up of children's hands touching different textures - one hand petting a soft fluffy bunny, another touching rough tree bark, another feeling smooth silk fabric, another touching bumpy pinecones. Tactile sensations emphasized. Cartoon style, variety of textures visible, warm colors, preschool appropriate.
image_prompts.description: Manos tocando texturas diferentes: suave y áspero

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in fun learning style: A child looking at bright flowers (eyes), listening to bells (ears with musical notes), smelling cookies (nose with aroma swirls), tasting apple (tongue/mouth), and touching teddy bear (hands). All five senses shown simultaneously in a circular composition around the happy child. Cartoon style, educational and playful, preschool appropriate.

Children's book illustration in playful style: Children playing in a park using all their senses - watching kites fly, listening to ice cream truck music, smelling picnic food, tasting treats, feeling grass and flowers. Active outdoor scene, everyone engaged and happy. Cartoon style, vibrant park setting, joyful activities, preschool appropriate.
image_prompts.description: Niños usando sus sentidos en el parque

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in bedtime calm style: A child in cozy pajamas before bed, looking at stars through window (sight), listening to lullaby (hearing), smelling lavender pillow (smell), tasting warm milk (taste), hugging soft stuffed animal (touch). Peaceful nighttime routine incorporating all senses. Cartoon style, soft calming colors, preschool appropriate.
image_prompts.description: Usando los sentidos antes de dormir

image_prompts.prompt: Children's book illustration in celebration style: A group of diverse happy children in a circle, each pointing to eyes, ears, nose, mouth, and hands with big smiles, celebrating their amazing senses. Sparkles and stars around them, rainbow in background. Triumphant and joyful mood. Cartoon style, festive bright colors, inclusive representation, preschool appropriate.

discussion_questions: ¿Cuál es tu color favorito que ves?
¿Qué cosas son suaves? ¿Qué cosas son ásperas?
extension_activities: Caja de misterio: tocar objetos sin verlos y adivinar qué son
Prueba de sabores: dulce, salado, agrio, amargo
Caminar con ojos cerrados guiados por sonidos
Juego de olores: identificar frutas y flores por el olfato
Collage de texturas: pegar materiales suaves y ásperos
Dibujar lo que vemos, oímos, olemos, probamos y tocamos
